Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class ProblemLoader

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.AbstractProblemLoader
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.ProblemLoader
public final class ProblemLoader extends AbstractProblemLoader
This class extends the functionality of the AbstractProblemLoader. It allows to do the loading process as SwingWorker Thread and it opens the proof obligation browser it is not possible to instantiate a proof configured by the opened file.

    • selectAndLoadProof

      protected void selectAndLoadProof(ProblemLoaderControl control, InitConfig initConfig)
      Description copied from class: AbstractProblemLoader
      Asks the user to select a proof obligation and loads it.
      Overrides:
      selectAndLoadProof in class AbstractProblemLoader
      Parameters:
      control - the ui controller.
      initConfig - the proof configuration.
      See Also:
      • AbstractProblemLoader.load()

    • runAsynchronously

      public void runAsynchronously()
      Launch a loading process asynchronously (on a swingworker thread). The start is announced by invoking ProverTaskListener.taskStarted(TaskStartedInfo) on the registered listener. Termination is announced by invoking ProverTaskListener.taskFinished(TaskFinishedInfo) on the registered listener.
